title: AquaPvP x16
body:
![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fca4e660a52a690c5addd598b3f130aa85a914cb.png)
- AQUAPVP - 16x PVP PACK
- LOW RESOLUTION TEXTURES FOR FPS BOOST
- MADE WITH HYPIXEL SKYWARS/BEDWARS IN MIND
- ALL SWORDS ARE SHORT FOR IMPROVED PVP
- GUI & CROSS-HAIR DESIGNED FOR ALL PVP MODES
- FEATURES CUSTOM SKY, PARTICLES, AND MENU SCREEN
